rule_hits.summary: Lists the references cited throughout the paper, detailing relevant works on language models, agent learning, and related methodologies.

AutoAct is an automatic agent learning framework for QA that does not rely on large-scale annotated data or synthetic planning trajectories from closed-source models. It synthes...
